process_details: 1000 mg physical mixture (1:1 ratio: 391.6 mg NAP + 608.1 mg IND) ground in mortar and pestle (60 s), transferred to aluminum dishes, melted in preheated oven at 441.15 K for 5 min, quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto the samples, stored in desiccator over P2O5 until at room temperature, then gently milled with mortar and pestle. Starting IND was the gamma polymorph.
notes: Stored at 277.15 K (4 °C) under dry conditions (phosphorus pentoxide) for 21 days; XRPD measured at days 0, 7, 14 and 21. Sample remained amorphous throughout. Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 300.54 K (deviation -2.10 K).

process_details: 1000 mg physical mixture (1:1 ratio: 391.6 mg NAP + 608.1 mg IND) ground in mortar and pestle (60 s), transferred to aluminum dishes, melted in preheated oven at 441.15 K for 5 min, quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto the samples, stored in desiccator over P2O5 until at room temperature, then gently milled with mortar and pestle. Starting IND was the gamma polymorph.
notes: Stored at 298.15 K (25 °C) under dry conditions (phosphorus pentoxide) for 21 days; XRPD measured at days 0, 7, 14 and 21. Sample remained amorphous throughout. Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 300.54 K (deviation -2.10 K).

process_details: 1000 mg physical mixture (1:2 NAP:IND molar ratio: 243.4 mg NAP + 756.6 mg IND) ground in mortar and pestle (60 s), transferred to aluminum dishes, melted in preheated oven at 441.15 K for 5 min, quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto the samples, stored in desiccator over P2O5 until at room temperature, then gently milled with mortar and pestle. Starting IND was the gamma polymorph.
notes: Stored at 277.15 K (4 °C) under dry conditions (phosphorus pentoxide) for 21 days; XRPD measured at days 0, 7, 14 and 21. Sample remained amorphous at 4 °C (recrystallization observed only at 25 °C). Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 306.79 K (deviation -1.63 K). Note: in section 2.2.1 the IND/NAP labels in mass parentheses appear to be inconsistent with figure conventions, but the figure-labeled NAP:IND molar ratios were used here, which is consistent with the reported Tg trends.

process_details: 1000 mg physical mixture (1:2 NAP:IND molar ratio: 243.4 mg NAP + 756.6 mg IND) ground in mortar and pestle (60 s), transferred to aluminum dishes, melted in preheated oven at 441.15 K for 5 min, quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto the samples, stored in desiccator over P2O5 until at room temperature, then gently milled with mortar and pestle. Starting IND was the gamma polymorph.
notes: Stored at 298.15 K (25 °C) under dry conditions (phosphorus pentoxide) for 21 days; XRPD measured at days 0, 7, 14 and 21. Recrystallization of excess γ-IND observed by day 21 (peaks at 11.8°, 17.2°, 22.0°, 26.7°). Exact onset between day 0 and day 21 not resolved in the publication; induction_time_days=21 used as last observation time. Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 306.79 K (deviation -1.63 K). Note: in section 2.2.1 the IND/NAP labels in mass parentheses appear to be inconsistent with figure conventions, but the figure-labeled NAP:IND molar ratios were used here, which is consistent with the reported Tg trends.

process_details: 1000 mg physical mixture (2:1 NAP:IND molar ratio: 562.8 mg NAP + 437.2 mg IND) ground in mortar and pestle (60 s), transferred to aluminum dishes, melted in preheated oven at 441.15 K for 5 min, quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto the samples, stored in desiccator over P2O5 until at room temperature, then gently milled with mortar and pestle. Starting IND was the gamma polymorph.
notes: Stored at 277.15 K (4 °C) under dry conditions (phosphorus pentoxide) for 21 days; XRPD measured at days 0, 7, 14 and 21. Recrystallization of excess crystalline NAP observed by day 21 (peak at 19.1°). Exact onset between day 0 and day 21 not resolved in the publication; induction_time_days=21 used as last observation time. Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 293.75 K (deviation -1.71 K). Note: in section 2.2.1 the IND/NAP labels in mass parentheses appear to be inconsistent with figure conventions, but the figure-labeled NAP:IND molar ratios were used here, which is consistent with the reported Tg trends.

Exact onset between day 0 and day 21 not resolved in the publication; induction_time_days=21 used as last observation time. Predicted Tg from Gordon-Taylor (no interaction): 293.75 K (deviation -1.71 K).
